rules.name: openapi-contract-required
rules.description: All backend endpoints must exist in the OpenAPI contract.

rules.name: controller-layer-only-http
rules.description: HTTP logic must only exist inside controllers.

rules.name: services-handle-business-logic
rules.description: Controllers must delegate logic to services.

rules.name: repository-pattern-required
rules.description: Database access must only occur through repositories.

rules.name: jwt-required-for-protected-routes
rules.description: All protected endpoints must require JWT authorization.

rules.name: admin-endpoints-require-role
rules.description: Admin endpoints must require admin role.

rules.name: stripe-events-idempotent
rules.description: Stripe webhook handlers must verify idempotency keys.

rules.name: dto-required
rules.description: Controllers must not expose domain entities.
